page_desc: Modern, dynamic and interactive drawing platform.
participate_title: Open participant screen in a new tab
part_wait_msg: Wait for the host to run the draw. Good luck! 🍀
part_you_won_msg: Congratulations! Show this screen to the host.
part_code_error: The code must be exactly 6 characters.
numbers_hint: Numbers are drawn without repetition within the configured range.
interactive_start_msg: Start the session to let others join from their devices.
scan_or_open: Scan or open the link to join
ready_msg: Set the options in the side panel and click the button below.
participants_empty_hint: Use Interactive Mode and share the code or QR Code.
help_overlay_hint: Hover over the rings to see details
alert_invalid_code: The code must be exactly 6 characters.
alert_invalid_range: Set valid minimum, maximum and quantity values.
alert_pool_exhausted: All candidates have been drawn! Reset the draw.
alert_pool_insufficient: You tried to draw {qty}, but only {available} are available.
alert_no_export: No results to export. Run at least one draw.
confirm_end_session: Really end the session? All participants will be disconnected.
confirm_regen: Generate a new code? Current participants will need to reconnect.
confirm_reset: Reset the draw? History will be cleared and items returned to the pool.
confirm_kick_all: Are you sure you want to remove ALL participants? They will be disconnected from the session.
confirm_leave: Are you sure you want to leave this draw?
alert_session_ended: The session was ended by the organizer.
alert_kicked: You were disconnected by the organizer.
help_btn_text: Opens this help overlay. Click anytime to see what each element does.
help_theme_text: Toggles between dark mode and light mode.
help_participate_text: Opens the participant screen so you or others can join an interactive draw using the session code.
help_tab_numbers_text: Draws random numbers within a range you define (minimum, maximum, and quantity).
help_tab_names_text: Draws names or items from a text list you fill in manually.
help_tab_interactive_text: Creates a live session where participants join via phone using a code or QR Code. Ideal for event draws.
help_draw_text: Runs the draw with the current settings and displays the winners with an animation.
help_theater_text: Expands to a presentation screen ideal for large displays or projectors at events. Shows drawn names dramatically.
help_reset_text: Clears all round history and returns items to the pool, allowing you to start from scratch.
help_participants_text: Lists participants connected to the session in real time. Already drawn participants appear crossed out and marked as "Drawn".
help_kick_text: Removes all participants connected to the current session immediately.
help_export_text: Downloads the complete draw history as a TXT file.
help_int_qty_text: Sets how many participants will be drawn at once in the next round.
help_int_title_text: An optional label (e.g. "Prize 1") to organize the draw. Appears in history and exported file.
help_repeat_text: If checked, participants who have already been drawn can win again in future rounds.
help_history_text: Records all draws performed. You can review the winners at any time.
help_num_min_text: Sets the starting number of the range for the draw.
help_num_max_text: Sets the ending number of the range for the draw.
help_num_qty_text: How many numbers will be drawn at once in this round.
help_names_list_text: Enter the items/names that will participate in the draw, separated by line.
help_names_qty_text: How many names will be drawn at once in this round.
